signals.content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a Section 301 investigation into forced labor and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect Chinese exports to the U.S., particularly electronics and consumer goods. Companies should assess exposure to Section 301 tariffs and BIS export controls.
signals.content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室已发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国对美出口，尤其是电子产品和消费品。企业应评估301关税及BIS出口管制风险。

checklist.desc: Ensure products have valid FCC Part 15/18 certification for U.S. market access.
Screen end users and parties against BIS Entity List and Denied Persons List.
Verify HTS codes and assess applicability of Section 301 tariffs; prepare for potential additional duties.
Determine if ECCN requires a BIS export license; apply if needed.
Prepare supply chain traceability documents to rebut forced labor allegations.

signals.content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls. This highlights strict US export controls on semiconductor equipment, including Entity List screening and Section 301 tariff risks.
signals.content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。这凸显了美国对半导体设备的严格出口管制，包括实体清单筛查和301条款关税风险。

checklist.desc: 对半导体制造设备进行BIS出口管制分类，确认ECCN编码，并筛查最终用户和最终用途是否涉及实体清单或军事用途。

checklist.task: 实体清单与受限方筛查
checklist.desc: 使用BIS实体清单、SDN清单等，对交易各方进行筛查，确保无受限方参与。
确认设备HTS编码是否在Section 301加征关税清单内，计算附加税率，并准备原产地证明。

checklist.task: 最终用户声明与许可证申请
checklist.desc: 获取最终用户和最终用途声明，评估是否需要BIS出口许可证，并提交申请。
如设备含无线通信功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证，保留FCC ID和合规声明。

signals.content_en: The US Department of Commerce revised license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must align with BIS Entity List restrictions and Section 301 tariff exposure.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关设备的管控。出口商必须遵守BIS实体清单限制和301条款关税风险。

checklist.desc: Screen all parties against BIS Entity List and Denied Persons List; obtain end-user/end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Map 10-digit HTS code to Section 301 tariff lists; document country of origin and value build-up to assess additional duties.
Confirm wireless electronics have FCC Part 15/18 certification; retain modular approval documentation.
Determine if ECCN requires BIS license; apply for license if needed and document license exception eligibility.
Verify that the semiconductor is not destined for military or surveillance end-uses listed under Entity List.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change reduces regulatory burdens for exporters of civilian firearms to the US, but compliance with standard BIS export controls and entity list screening remains essential.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化减轻了向美国出口民用枪支的监管负担，但仍需遵守标准BIS出口管制和实体清单筛查。

checklist.desc: 对民用枪支出口进行BIS出口管制筛查，确认不受实体清单或最终用途限制。
对交易方进行实体清单筛查，确保无涉军或涉恐风险。
确认HS编码9303.90，评估Section 301关税风险，准备原产地证明。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This means that any entity owned or controlled by a listed entity is now also subject to the same export restrictions. Exporters must screen all parties in the transaction chain, including affiliates, subsidiaries, and parent companies, to ensure compliance. Failure to do so may result in penalties.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部已将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司。这意味着任何由被列实体拥有或控制的实体现在也受到相同的出口限制。出口商必须筛查交易链中的所有当事方，包括关联公司、子公司和母公司，以确保合规。否则可能面临处罚。

checklist.desc: Run restricted party and export control screening on all parties, including affiliates, subsidiaries, and parent companies; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Verify corporate structure and ownership links to any entity on the BIS Entity List; document control relationships.
Obtain signed end-use and end-user certificates from all parties, especially for dual-use items.
Determine if an export license is required based on ECCN and destination; apply for license if needed.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole that allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass U.S. export controls. This action tightens restrictions on the export of advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and technology to these facilities, requiring licenses for shipments that were previously exempt. Companies must now ensure compliance with BIS regulations, including entity list screening and end-use checks.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部关闭了外国在华半导体代工厂规避出口管制的漏洞。此举加强了对向这些设施出口先进半导体制造设备和技术的限制，要求对先前豁免的货物申请许可证。企业必须确保遵守BIS法规，包括实体清单筛查和最终用途检查。

checklist.desc: 对客户和最终用户进行BIS实体清单筛查，确保未涉及受限制实体。
获取并审核最终用途声明，确认产品不会用于军事或未经授权的半导体制造。
根据BIS要求，为受控设备和技术申请出口许可证，并保留相关文件。
确认10位HTS编码，评估是否受Section 301关税影响，并计算附加税。
如涉及无线设备，确认FCC Part 15/18认证，确保供应商FCC ID有效。

signals.content_en: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing restrictions for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening requirements.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制，降低对特定物品的限制。此变更可能影响美国出口管制和实体清单筛查要求。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
